Ryan’s Big Idea Template -- EXAMPLE 



The product and editor is:

Jim Rickards’ Currency War’s Alert – a new back-end trading service scheduled to launch March 2015.

What are the best qualities of this editor? 

Jim’s CIA background – Jim will use the same techniques he uses for the CIA for this new service (Bayesian analysis, Complexity Theory, etc.)… 

Jim literally wrote the book on Currency Wars…

The actual moneymaking opportunity is: 

Buying puts and calls on ETFs and stocks that are moving because of Currency Wars.

What is your most powerful proof this opportunity is real? 

At least 25 back-tested examples of making 1000%+ by buying puts and calls on ETFs or stocks moved by currency wars / central banking manipulations.

The story from one of the books on how Jim helped the CIA detect unusual options trades on 9-11….

The story from one of the books about Jim’s meeting at Applied Physics Laboratory to simulate financial war-games…

This opportunity satisfies the primal desire of this market to:

Make a lot of money fast using a new form of “currency trading”…that doesn’t use FOREX or stocks.

Make 1,000% (or more) from Currency Wars… using something safer than how most people trade stocks.

The “magic mechanism(s)” that lets readers achieve this desire is:

The I.M.P.A.C.T. System – “International Monetary Policy Analysis and Currency Trading” 

Currency Wars

This is unique because:

IMPACT uses systems and techniques developed by Jim Rickards for the CIA and Department of Defense to detect and predict terrorist activity.

Readers need to get in right now because: 

Currency Wars are breaking out all the time… There are at least 3 ways right now you can possibly 1000% using the IMPACT system (the 3 most current recommendations).

This is the biggest, most important thing in all of history / our lifetimes because:

Jim believes his IMPACT System is the most powerful strategy you will ever find to profit from currency wars…

How does the solution make this “done for you” without having to:

You can make money from currency manipulations without touching stocks, bonds, or the FOREX markets.

What kind of lead are you thinking of using? 

Secret Lead – never ever telling the reader the strategy utilizes options trading.

If there is a villain in the promotion, who is he? 

Central bankers. 

What are the intangible or material benefits from use of Magic Mechanism?  

If you can make 1000% on a regular basis, you should have plenty of money to enjoy traveling around the world, writing novels, playing more golf, etc. Plus you can have piece of mind knowing you have a tool to both survive currency crises and also profit.

This opportunity is like:

When central bankers manipulate their currencies, it’s like the bankers are throwing rocks in a pond… the ripples affect the currency markets, the stock markets, and finally the options markets. This is about making money from these ripples.

You can make money both directions using calls and puts, so it’s like standing a coin on its edge to make money heads or tails, or a “3-sided coin.”

Can you brainstorm a “hook” for your lead?

1,000% gains (or more) …from Currency Wars…  using same methods used by the CIA to detect terrorists…

What is your superior, irresistible offer?

The CWA service… 

3 current picks you can tease…

A “handbook” of how IMPACT trading works…

60-day money-back guarantee… 

Can you add a “twist” or “wow” moment later in the package? 

The idea that you can make money on both sides of a Currency War… for example, from calls on the ETF tracking the Swiss franc while also gain from puts on the ETF tracking the Euro…
